# defectdojo_user_contact_info (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo User Contact Info

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_user_contact_info" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `block_execution` (Boolean) Instead of async deduping a finding the findings will be deduped synchronously
- `cell_number` (String) Cell number in format '+999999999'. Up to 15 digits allowed.
- `force_password_reset` (Boolean) Forces this user to reset their password on next login
- `github_username` (String) GitHub username
- `phone_number` (String) Phone number in format '+999999999'. Up to 15 digits allowed.
- `slack_user_id` (String) Slack user ID
- `slack_username` (String) Email address associated with your Slack account
- `title` (String) Title of the user
- `twitter_username` (String) Twitter username
- `user` (Number) The ID of the User this contact info belongs to
